commands.review_summary:
The PR adds iMessage outbound allowlist enforcement for normal sends, private-API actions, group mutations, trusted reply-sender propagation, direct/group target classification, and related regression tests, plus small CI test expectation fixes.

PR surface: Source +450, Tests +1426. Total +1876 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and v2026.5.28 send and action paths reach transport/private-API work without an outbound dmPolicy/groupPolicy allowlist gate, while the docs define those policies as access control. I did not run a live iMessage reproduction in this read-only review.
